hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "npm run (make_slides|linkedin)"; then if [ -z "$ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" ]; then echo "[hook] ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not set — legacy slide/LinkedIn scripts require it. Use /make-slides or /linkedin-post skills instead (no API key needed)."; fi; fi'

bash -c 'cd "/Users/andrii/Documents/R files/_My projects/Energy analysis/energy-blog" 2>/dev/null && if git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q "slides\.md"; then echo "[hook] slides.md was modified — re-render PDF: npm run render <slug>"; fi'
